description: REST API for xAI compatible with other providers.

novel_features.name: Model picker
novel_features.description: Rank live xAI models for a task using the authenticated model catalog.

novel_features.name: Cost preview
novel_features.description: Estimate xAI token cost from live model pricing metadata before sending a request.

novel_features.name: Model capability matrix
novel_features.description: Build a live capability matrix across chat, reasoning, vision, embedding, image, and video models.

novel_features.name: Smoke chat
novel_features.description: Verify that the authenticated key can run a tiny xAI chat completion.

novel_features.name: Credential capability audit
novel_features.description: Inspect the authenticated xAI API key status and permissions without exposing the secret value.

novel_features.name: Agent raw endpoint browser
novel_features.description: Browse the complete generated xAI endpoint surface by interface for agent planning and fallback calls.
